title: Save any link instantly
description: Paste a URL or press Ctrl+V anywhere in the app. Purl fetches the title, favicon, and full content automatically.

title: Ask anything with AI
description: Ask "what did I read about X last week?" and Purl searches across all your saved content to give you a real answer.

title: Deep PDF understanding
description: Upload a PDF and ask questions about it. Purl reads the full document and surfaces exactly what you need.

title: Semantic search
description: Find anything across your library by meaning, not just keywords. Ask in plain English and Purl surfaces the right content.

title: Bring your own key
description: Add your own Anthropic API key in Settings to get full AI access for free. You pay Anthropic directly; Purl covers embeddings.

title: Purl API
description: Access your saved content programmatically. Query your library, trigger ingestion, and build on top of your knowledge base.
